description: High-aggression architecture campaign ideas for the separate Codex autoresearch loop.

ideas.title: XSA + Neural Cache
ideas.goal: Implement a self-contained XSA or top-layer cross-window KV cache branch that preserves causal scoring and stays submission-plausible.
hints: Prefer top-layer cache before whole-model cache.
Prefer an isolated XSA or cache branch over a blended first attempt.
Do not turn the first six attempts into a full eval-harness rewrite.

ideas.title: Late Selective Compression-Aware Quantization
ideas.goal: Explore coarse tensor-group quantization schedules and selective higher precision without drifting into fine-grained mixed-bit complexity.
hints: Use coarse groups such as embeddings or head, early attention, late attention, middle MLPs, and final MLPs.
Prefer later fake quant or post-quant selection over blanket early QAT.
Avoid per-row heterogeneous bit allocation in the first six attempts.

ideas.title: Low-Rank Q Structural Reallocation
ideas.goal: Use factored or low-rank Q to fund stronger carrier changes such as more unique depth, better local modules, or more steps.
hints: Do not stop at low-rank Q alone if a stronger reallocation is feasible.
Prefer using the savings for depth or module quality rather than tiny local tweaks.

ideas.title: Split Local-Context Families
ideas.goal: Keep XSA-family and SmearGate or TTT-family ideas separate instead of stacking them prematurely.
hints: Family A: XSA + EMA + partial RoPE + late QAT, no TTT.
Family B: SmearGate + smarter bigram + mixed low-bit quant + meta-TTT or causal TTT, no XSA.
Do not blur the families unless earlier evidence makes the interaction worth testing.

ideas.title: Compute-Aware Context Curriculum
ideas.goal: Use shorter context early and longer context later, reclaiming compute with carrier or batch changes instead of brute force.
hints: Prefer 1024 or 1536 to 2048 curricula over jumping directly to very long context.
Use batch shrink or structural savings to pay for longer context.

ideas.title: Smarter Local-Token Module
ideas.goal: Replace crude BigramHash scaling with a better byte-quality local-token module.
hints: Good candidates include top-N exact bigram plus hashed tail, two-scale local features, or a factorized bigram projection.
Keep the implementation compact and submission-plausible.

ideas.title: Quantization-Optimized Checkpoint Soup
ideas.goal: Select or average checkpoints based on post-quant quality rather than best float loss.
hints: A viable branch is no QAT, denser warmdown checkpoints, post-quant selection, and selective soup.
Keep the first attempts simple and structured-output-safe.

ideas.title: Localized Canon Inserts
ideas.goal: Try one or two localized Canon-style neighbor-mixing inserts instead of a full Canon pivot.
hints: Prefer lower-stack or pre-final-XSA placements.
Keep the change local and interpretable.

ideas.title: Selective INT4 MLP Moonshot
ideas.goal: Probe selective INT4 on less-sensitive middle MLPs while keeping boundary and final MLPs safer.
hints: Treat this as a late high-risk branch.
Do not do blanket INT4 everywhere.
Prefer selective middle-layer MLP targets only.
